display.purpose: Hero headings only. Large, bold, tight tracking.

label.purpose: Button text, form labels, badges, small UI.

shadows.name: sm
shadows.purpose: Card rest state, navbar scroll state.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for all entrances and state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main CTA. Uses brand gradient, white text, blue shadow glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #5271FF 0%, #38B6FF 100%); color: #fff; padding: 12px 32px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.5; cursor: pointer; transition: filter 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px rgba(82,113,255,0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.1); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #5271FF; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Light background, dark text, subtle border. For paired actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #fff; color: #0F172A; padding: 10px 24px; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB; border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.5; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #F9FAFB; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0F172A; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Transparent with white border. For dark backgrounds only.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #fff; padding: 10px 24px; border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3); border-radius: 10px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.5; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #fff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container with rounded corners, subtle border, light shadow.
components.html:
Judul Card

Deskripsi singkat tentang fitur atau use case.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid rgba(229,231,235,0.8); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: box-shadow 0.2s; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.07); }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with 8px radius, neutral border, primary focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #fff; color: #0F172A; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid #E5E7EB; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9CA3AF; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #5271FF; outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(82,113,255,0.2); }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small pill tag in primary tint. For feature labels without card context.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #5271FF; background: rgba(82,113,255,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(82,113,255,0.2); }

components.name: Navbar Logo (dark)
components.description: Logo in dark variant for light/solid backgrounds.
components.html: Rupix

narrative.overview:
Rupix speaks with banking-grade confidence without being cold or corporate. The system uses a bold blue-to-cyan gradient as its visual anchor — evoking technology, security, and the future of payments. Against dark hero backgrounds, bright gradient CTAs pull focus; against light surfaces, the neutral palette provides a calm, authoritative reading experience.

Every design decisions starts from one premise: this is about biometric security — people's hands, their identity, their money. The interface must feel as safe as a bank vault and as fast as a wave. No gimmicks, no playful excess, no decorative clutter that undermines trust.
keyCharacteristics: Gradient-driven identity: primary blue (#5271FF → #38B6FF) is the signature finish
Motion that enhances understanding, never for decoration
Indonesian-first: language, cultural cues, mobile-centric breakpoints

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The brand gradient is used deliberately — hero background, primary CTAs — not as a decorative wash on every section. Its presence signals 'this is actionable.'

rules.name: The Trust Contrast Rule
rules.body: Body text never falls below WCAG AA 4.5:1. Gray-on-gray for body copy is strictly prohibited.

rules.name: The Tight Tracking Ceiling
rules.body: Display headings never go tighter than -0.03em letter-spacing. At -0.04em and below, the letters touch and read as cramped.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to scroll state or hover interaction.

dos: Do use the brand gradient on primary CTAs and key interactive elements — it signals 'this is the action.'
Do use generous whitespace between sections (80px+/5rem) to let content breathe.
Do keep body text at WCAG AA 4.5:1 contrast minimum — dark text on light backgrounds.
Do use `text-wrap: balance` on display headings for even line lengths.
Do support `prefers-reduced-motion` — provide instant transitions when animations are disabled.
Do design mobile-first with breakpoints at 640px, 768px, 1024px, 1280px.
donts: Don't use gray text on colored backgrounds — use a darker shade of the background's own hue instead.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing — stick to `easeOut` for entrances and state transitions.
Don't use gradient text (`background-clip: text`) as decoration — use solid colors for readability.
Don't wrap everything in cards or nest cards inside cards — prefer full-bleed sections with clear typographic hierarchy.
Don't put an uppercase eyebrow ('PRODUK' / 'FITUR') above every section — choose a different cadence.
Don't use decorative animations (parallax, floating elements) that don't serve the user's understanding.
Don't use pure black (#000) or pure gray — always tint toward the brand's neutral hue.
Don't use glassmorphism as default — reserve frosted glass for specific contextual overlays.
